Subject: Quick question regarding [Topic/Challenge] at [Company Name]

Hi [First Name],

I’ve been following [Company Name]’s recent work with [Industry Trend/Project], and I was really impressed by your team's approach to [Specific Achievement].

I’m reaching out because I work with companies like yours to solve [Specific Pain Point, e.g., manual data entry or system integration errors]. We typically help our partners [Insert major benefit, e.g., cut processing time in half].

Do you have 10 minutes for a brief introductory call next [Day of week] or [Day of week] at [Time, e.g., 2:00 PM EST] to see if this might be a fit for your team?

Alternatively, you can book a time directly on my calendar here: [Insert Calendar Link].

Thanks for your time,

[Your Name] > [Your Title]
